meaning: adj.海图上未标明的,未知的,不详的
examples: We are entering into uncharted territory now, in terms of the amount of carbon dioxide.
This movement, driven by powerful and diverse motivations, built a nation out of a wilderness and, by its nature, shaped the character and destiny of an uncharted continent.
The ship hit an uncharted rock.
Despite these developments, Papua New Guinea retains an aura of uncharted territory, with a decidedly nascent tourism infrastructure.
In every way we could imagine, we blazed a path of our own into uncharted territory.
